scripts.test:e2e:all: npm run test:e2e:mocked && npm run test:e2e:integration
scripts.test:e2e:smoke: cross-env E2E_RUN_BACKEND=true npx playwright test e2e/api-smoke.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:auth: cross-env E2E_RUN_BACKEND=true npx playwright test e2e/auth.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:nav: cross-env E2E_RUN_BACKEND=true npx playwright test e2e/navigation.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:workflow: cross-env E2E_RUN_BACKEND=true npx playwright test e2e/workflow.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:robust: cross-env E2E_RUN_BACKEND=true npx playwright test e2e/ui-robustness.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:headed:smoke: cross-env E2E_RUN_BACKEND=true E2E_HEADLESS=false npx playwright test e2e/api-smoke.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:headed:workflow: cross-env E2E_RUN_BACKEND=true E2E_HEADLESS=false npx playwright test e2e/workflow.spec.ts
